pi_items.verified_value: ArkCase Open Source - real case management platform
pi_items.source: Web search and GitHub verification: ArkCase is a real, open-source case management system maintained at https://github.com/ArkCase/ArkCase. Used for FOIA, complaint management, incident management, and correspondence management
task_utils.sh:9-11 and task.json:5 - test credentials for development ArkCase instance using dev.arkcase.com LDAP domain
task_utils.sh:11 and task.json:5 - test password for development/test ArkCase instance

privileged_info_summary: This task uses synthetic test data. The case 'Community Park Vandalism' is created by the setup script. The URL https://www.justice.gov/foia is a real, valid government website that redirects to the Office of Information Policy page. However, the expected title metadata 'Official DOJ FOIA Guidelines' is INCORRECT - the actual page title is 'Office of Information Policy | Office of Information Policy'. The test credentials (arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com / ArkCase1234!) are verified as test credentials for the development ArkCase instance. ArkCase is confirmed as a real, open-source case management platform.
